title: SK Hynix ships first 12-layer HBM4E samples to AI customers
description: SK Hynix said on Thursday that it had begun shipping samples of HBM4E, its next generation of high-bandwidth memory for AI, to major customers. The number that matters is the one the chipmaker is leading with: a 12-layer stack reaching 48GB of capacity, running at up to 16Gbps per pin, with power efficiency improved by [...] This story continues at The Next Web

title: Policloud signs €580m deal for European sovereign AI cloud with CloudGrid Energy
description: French AI cloud startup Policloud has secured a €580 million ($672.44m) framework contract from CloudGrid Energy to deploy a European sovereign AI platform. Shared by Policloud on LinkedIn, the contract will span 280 “Policloud units,” totaling 29,000 GPUs, two million CPUs, and 35MW of compute capacity. – CloudGrid Energy Policloud units are modular, containerized, and [...]

title: Microsoft powers ByteDance and other Chinese tech giants with AI models, Bloomberg reports
description: Microsoft has built a substantial business by selling artificial intelligence models to Chinese tech giants, such as ByteDance, Ant Group, Meituan (3690), and Tencent (0700), Bloomberg reported, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: JPMorgan blocks Anthropic AI access for Hong Kong staff, FT reports
description: JPMorgan Chase has stopped its staff in Hong Kong from accessing Anthropic's AI models, in a sign of intense scrutiny on the technology's use outside the U.S., the Financial Times reported on Thursday, citing three people familiar with the matter.

title: Seafood Expo Asia and Seafood Processing Asia Unveil 2026 Conference Program on AI, Sustainability, Aquaculture and Consumer Trust
